questionHtml: Sketch the first eight successive ionisation energies of sulfur.
markschemeHtml:
two regions of small increases AND a large increase between them✔

large increase from 6th to 7th ✔


Accept line/curve showing these trends.

meta.title: Sketch the first eight successive ionisation energies of sulfur.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter
Structure 1.3.7—Successive ionization energy (IE) data for an element give information about its electron configuration. Deduce the group of an element from its successive ionization data.
